name: mostStringToAscii
title: mostStringToAscii
syntax: long mostStringToAscii(byte sourceData[], long sourceDatalen, char buffer[], long buffersize);
description: Convert MOST string to ASCII string. Unsupported characters in the input data are ignored.

parameters.name: sourceData
parameters.description: A buffer containing the MOST string to be decoded.

parameters.name: sourceDataLen
parameters.description: The size of the buffer containing the MOST string.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer to which the ASCII string is copied.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of copied ASCII string bytes (can be specified with (elcount(buffer))).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
